name: drift-detector
description: Drift Detector for Claude Code — per-turn behavioral drift scoring, live badge, and automatic correction nudges.

plugins.name: drift-detector
plugins.description: Detects when Claude drifts from your output contract (persona, format, length rules) and steers it back. Deterministic scoring engine, live statusline badge, one-shot correction nudge. 170-session eval: 100% accuracy, FP=0.
